subject: Main House layout
body:
Dear Jeffrey

I hope everything is well (or better) with you. 
Enclosed are the latest plans for the main house.? Let me know your comments.? I am trying to put together a summary of?what we talked about last time.
I am here in St. Petersburg and visited the scagliola atelier, the sample of the big wall in tortoise shell are incredibly beautiful.? Are you still thinking on the sitting room at the library?? Today, I will go to the amber atelier, it is a pity that we never preceded with the desk.? I have a possibility of doing it for the Dresden?Ring Museum for the Boulle exhibition that I am preparing for 2009.
I had a meeting in Paris for the office library and I was reminded the?outstanding invoices (hardware, lighting, ceiling).? It is becoming crucial for our continuation of fabrication according to our schedule.? Also, Jeffery, it comes to my attention that we are late in our fees plus the bills I received and forwarded to you from the architectural agencies that had been working?in the project.? I would appreciate taking care of this promptly.
I spoke with Julie yesterday and I will send a sketch for those steps (the nursery)
JP

________________________________________________________________________

body_html:
Dear Jeffrey

I hope everything is well (or better) with you.
Enclosed are the latest plans for the main house.  Let me know your comments.  I am trying to put together a summary of what we talked about last time.
I am here in St. Petersburg and visited the scagliola atelier, the sample of the big wall in tortoise shell are incredibly beautiful.  Are you still thinking on the sitting room at the library?  Today, I will go to the amber atelier, it is a pity that we never preceded with the desk.  I have a possibility of doing it for the Dresden Ring Museum for the Boulle exhibition that I am preparing for 2009.
I had a meeting in Paris for the office library and I was reminded the outstanding invoices (hardware, lighting, ceiling).  It is becoming crucial for our continuation of fabrication according to our schedule.  Also, Jeffery, it comes to my attention that we are late in our fees plus the bills I received and forwarded to you from the architectural agencies that had been working in the project.  I would appreciate taking care of this promptly.
I spoke with Julie yesterday and I will send a sketch for those steps (the nursery)
JP
